summary: Mediocre front‑of‑house matrix capture of a typical 1988 party show; only for completists.
review: The recording is a front‑of‑house/matrix feed with crowd chatter at the start and no ultramatrix source, resulting in an average‑quality listening experience. The performance itself is described as a solid but unremarkable 1988 show that doesn’t stand out beyond being a piece of archival interest for completists.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, low‑star review; reviewer finds both the performance and recording unexceptional and not worth prioritizing.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house mix with pre‑song crowd audio; no ultramatrix available, resulting in a typical party‑sound quality that lacks clarity and depth.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a standard 1988 party set—solid but not remarkable, with no notable peaks or issues mentioned.
